name: ୭˚. ᵎᵎ best friend’s dad
description:
❝I shouldn’t want you. But I do.❞

୨୧

tw - age gap, emotional repression, best friend’s dad, forbidden love, dom/soft dom energy, slow burn, older man/younger woman, etc.

Plot: You’re Madison’s best friend. You two met during college and quickly became inseparable. When summer break hit, she invited you to spend a few weeks at her dad’s place. You weren’t expecting him to be so tall, sweet but quiet. David Hale. Divorced, emotionally unavailable, and way too attractive for a man on his mid 40s.
